Profitability Calculator (batch P&L estimate)
Operating Costs per crop cycle — edit amounts, add or remove items
Assumptions (all editable): "One-time" costs are charged once per m² for the cycle; "Recurring" costs are charged per m² for every month of the cycle. Defaults are typical Zone E2 greenhouse estimates — adjust to match your own records.
Labour note: the MUR 60/m²/month default assumes roughly MUR 20,000/month for one skilled greenhouse worker. The national minimum wage in Mauritius (Jan 2026) is Rs 17,745/month — our default is slightly above minimum, reflecting skilled greenhouse work.

Variety Decision Support System ZONE E2
Historical Performance + Local Risk Profile = Predictive Intelligence.
Select a locality and crop to see which variety to plant, expected yield after risk factors, and a data-driven recommendation.
Yield Scenario (applied to reference baseline only)
Market Price Override (MUR/kg) (leave 0 to use variety defaults)
MUR Using variety defaults
Variety performance data not loaded. Load it now for real baseline yields. Calculator will use static reference data otherwise.
Yield Limiting Factors (optional — tick to apply to the analysis)
Factors are applied on top of locality risk profile. Combined effect multiplies down with diminishing returns — same as the Final Estimated Yield calculator.

MOCK MODE — synthetic data only. No GAS connection. Toggle off before going live.
All year (avg)
JanFebMarAprMayJun JulAugSepOctNovDecAvg
—
Load data to see the yield legend
Attention needed — 0 localities below threshold
Click any marker to open the locality detail panel. Circle size, colour & opacity reflect yield intensity per m² — colour family is crop-specific (🍅 red · 🌶️ amber · 🥒 green). Use the month slider to scrub through seasonal patterns — or press ▶ Play for animated month-by-month playback. During playback an overlay shows the climatic conditions, limiting factors & yield score for each month so you can see exactly why yields rise or fall. Dot size pulses with the climate score. Anomaly alerts flag localities >30% below the zone median.
Online Growers — Live Presence LIVE
No growers online right now
Auto-refreshes every 60 seconds. Growers appear here within 90 s of logging in.
A grower is shown as Online if their browser sent a heartbeat ping in the last 3 minutes. The ping fires every 90 seconds automatically after login. Closing the browser tab removes them within 3 minutes.
Register New Greenhouse Crop
Up to 6 Greenhouses — how it works
1
Fill the form below for your first greenhouse — crop, area, stage, variety, yield.
2
Press ➕ Add to Queue. The form clears — ready for your next greenhouse.
3
Repeat steps 1–2 for each GH (up to 6). Each one appears in the queue below.
4
Once all greenhouses are queued, press ☁ Submit All to send everything at once.
Queue:
